step: assume true for n, prove for n + 1
      have h₂ : n + 1 ≤ n ^ 2 := by
        have h₃ : n ≥ 4 := hn
        have h₄ : n + 1 ≤ n ^ 2 := by
          cases n with
          | zero => contradiction -- n cannot be zero since hn : 4 ≤ n
          | succ n =>
            cases n with
            | zero => contradiction -- n cannot be 1 since hn : 4 ≤ n
            | succ n =>
              cases n with
              | zero => contradiction -- n cannot be 2 since hn : 4 ≤ n
              | succ n =>
                cases n with
                | zero => contradiction -- n cannot be 3 since hn : 4 ≤ n
                | succ n =>
                  simp [Nat.pow_succ, Nat.mul_succ] at *
                  <;> ring_nf at *
                  <;> nlinarith
        exact h₄
      have h₃ : (n + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (n + 1) * n ^ 2 := by
        have h₄ : n + 1 ≤ n ^ 2 := h₂
        have h₅ : (n + 1) ^ 2 = (n + 1) * (n + 1) := by ring
        have h₆ : (n + 1) * (n + 1) ≤ (n + 1) * n ^ 2 := by
          exact Nat.mul_le_mul_left (n + 1) h₄
        linarith
      have h₄ : (n + 1) * n ^ 2 ≤ (n + 1) * n ! := by
        have h₅ : n ^ 2 ≤ n ! := IH
        have h₆ : (n + 1) * n ^ 2 ≤ (n + 1) * n ! := by
          exact Nat.mul_le_mul_left (n + 1) h₅
        exact h₆
      have h₅ : (n + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (n + 1) * n ! := by
        calc
          (n + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (n + 1) * n ^ 2 := h₃
          _ ≤ (n + 1) * n ! := h₄
      have h₆ : (n + 1) * n ! = (n + 1)! := by
        simp [Nat.factorial]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> simp_all [Nat.factorial]
        <;> linarith
      calc
        (n + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (n + 1) * n ! := h₅
        _ = (n + 1)! := by rw [h₆]
  exact h₁ n h₀

step: assume true for k, prove for k + 1

        have h₃ : k ≥ 4 := by linarith
        have h₄ : k + 1 ≤ k ^ 2 := by
          have h₅ : k ≥ 4 := by linarith
          have h₆ : k ^ 2 ≥ k + 1 := by
            nlinarith
          linarith
        calc
          (k + 1) ^ 2 = (k + 1) * (k + 1) := by ring
          _ ≤ (k + 1) * k ^ 2 := by
            exact Nat.mul_le_mul_left (k + 1) h₄
      have h₃ : (k + 1) * k ^ 2 ≤ (k + 1) * k ! := by
        have h₄ : k ^ 2 ≤ k ! := IH
        exact Nat.mul_le_mul_left (k + 1) h₄
      have h₄ : (k + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (k + 1) * k ! := by
        calc
          (k + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (k + 1) * k ^ 2 := h₂
          _ ≤ (k + 1) * k ! := h₃
      have h₅ : (k + 1) * k ! = (k + 1)! := by
        simp [Nat.factorial]
        <;> ring
      have h₆ : (k + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (k + 1)! := by
        calc
          (k + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (k + 1) * k ! := h₄
          _ = (k + 1)! := by rw [h₅]
      exact h₆
